title: lobelia gloria-montis
intro: Lobelia gloria-montis is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as the mountain bellflower. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic and expectorant effects, making it beneficial for relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia gloria-montis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and capsules, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
